---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ResiliPlan
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

**Example:** "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Use Case

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful:

1. User opens ResiliPlan
2. User wants to [...]
3. With this feature, user can [...]
4. Without this feature, user has to [...]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking my usage)
- [ ] High (significantly improves my workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## Scope

- [ ] Affects core DRP functionality
- [ ] Affects AI features
- [ ] Affects compliance/audit features
- [ ] Affects user management
- [ ] Affects export/integration
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Related Standards

If applicable, which standards does this feature relate to?
- [ ] ISO 22301
- [ ] NIST SP 800-34
- [ ] BCI GPG
- [ ] ISO/IEC 27001
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, references, or any other context.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can only provide feedback (no implementation)
